Industry Affiliations

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.5" _module_preset="default" text_text_color="#FFFFFF" animation_style="slide" animation_direction="bottom" animation_intensity_slide="8%" global_colors_info="{%22gcid-heading-color%22:%91%22title_text_color%22,%22header_2_text_color%22%93,%22gcid-body-color%22:%91%22text_text_color%22%93}"]

Bari Produce is proud to be actively engaged in the produce industry. Our affiliations reflect our commitment to professionalism, accountability, and staying informed as the marketplace evolves.

We value collaboration, shared standards, and ongoing learning because delivering consistent quality requires staying connected to the industry as a whole.
